description_long: This bungalow features a low, horizontal profile with a combination of hip and gable roof sections in dark gray, giving it a modern yet classic suburban appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with large windows and a prominent front entrance. A driveway leads to a detached garage structure, connected by a walkway to the main house. The rear of the bungalow includes a patio area and what appears to be a small pool or water feature, suggesting outdoor leisure space. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, with more varied placements on the sides and rear. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of single-story residential homes in urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip-and-gable roof, light exterior walls, a detached garage, and a rear patio with a pool. The design is modern and compact, with symmetrical front windows and a functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, connecting walkway, and a glimpse of the rear patio and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, walkway, and the full extent of the roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with varied side and rear placements
